basic_details.job_title: MSC Bank Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Officers and Junior Officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank (MSC Bank) Officer and Junior Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 18 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the MSC Bank Officer and Junior Officer Recruitment 2026 for posts including Officer Grade II and Junior Officer in various treasury-related functions.

qualification.details: Candidates must possess a B.Com / M.Com degree from a university / Institution / Board recognized by the Government of India.

salary_details.details: Officer Gr. II (Forex): Rs. 60000 Per Month Officer Gr. II (Dealer Money market): Rs. 60000 Per Month Officer Gr. II (Back Office): Rs. 60000 Per Month Junior Officer (CSGL): Rs. 54000 Per Month Junior Officer (Forex): Rs. 54000 Per Month Junior Officer (Mid Office Own): Rs. 54000 Per Month

selection_process: Application Scrutiny Interview Background Verification Police Verification Medical Examination Document Verification
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://msc.bank.in/career.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MSC Bank Treasury Specialized Officers posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the MSC Bank Treasury Specialized Officers recruitment is 08 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the bank by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed a B.Com or M.Com degree from a university or institution recognized by the Government of India to be eligible for these positions.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Treasury Specialized Officers?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for Treasury Specialized Officers posts announced by the Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the MSC Bank Treasury Specialized Officers recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Treasury Specialized Officers posts ranges from Rs. 54,000 to Rs. 60,000 per month, depending on the specific post and grade.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for MSC Bank recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Treasury Specialized Officers posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes application scrutiny, followed by an interview, background verification, police verification, medical examination, and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank at https://msc.bank.in/career.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of MSC Bank?
faq.answer: The official website of the Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank is https://msc.bank.in/. The career section can be accessed for more details.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 05 / MSC Bank / 2026-27.
